queryRules.ruleDef:
#define "require" as bool default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "强制要求设置字符集" #define "character_set" as string default "utf8mb4" enum ["utf8", "utf8mb4"] hint "允许使用的字符集"
// 对于 alert 语句，只有当设置了 character set 选项时候才进行校验 if @domain.sqlType in ['ALERT_CATALOG'] and @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.characterSet) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{character_set}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
end
// 对于 create 语句，检测是否必须设置 character set 选项 if @domain.sqlType == 'CREATE_CATALOG' then
if cast(#{require} as bool) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{character_set}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
else
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.characterSet) then return true else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
end
end

#define "require" as bool default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "强制要求设置排序规则" #define "collate" as string default "utf8mb4_unicode_ci" enum ["utf8_unicode_ci", "utf8mb4_unicode_ci"] hint "允许使用的排序规则"
// 对于 alert 语句，只有当设置了 collate 选项时候才进行校验 if @domain.sqlType in ['ALERT_CATALOG'] and @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.collate) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{collate}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
end
// 对于 create 语句，检测是否必须设置 collate 选项 if @domain.sqlType == 'CREATE_CATALOG' then
if cast(#{require} as bool) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{collate}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
else
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.collate) then return true else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
end
end

#define "caseType" as string default "Lower case" enum ["Lower case", "Upper case", "Lower camel case", "Upper camel case"] hint "名称拼写规则"
if @domain.sqlType == 'CREATE_CATALOG' then checkName = @domain.catalog elseif @domain.sqlType == 'RENAME_CATALOG' then checkName = @domain.newName else return true end
// ref document https://newbedev.com/regex-for-pascalcased-words-aka-camelcased-with-leading-uppercase-letter
if #{caseType} == 'Lower case' then return @func.string.lowerCase(checkName) == checkName
elseif #{caseType} == 'Upper case' then
return @func.string.upperCase(checkName) == checkName
elseif #{caseType} == 'Lower camel case' then return checkName matches '[a-z]+((\d)|([A-Z0-9][a-z0-9]+))*([A-Z])?'
elseif #{caseType} == 'Upper camel case' then return checkName matches '([A-Z][a-z0-9]+)((\d)|([A-Z0-9][a-z0-9]+))*([A-Z])?'
else
return false end

#define "require" as bool default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "强制要求设置字符集" #define "character_set" as string default "utf8mb4" enum ["utf8", "utf8mb4"] hint "允许使用的字符集"
// 对于 alter 语句，只有当设置了 character set 选项时候才进行校验 if @domain.sqlType in ['ALTER_CATALOG'] and @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.characterSet) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{character_set}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
end
// 对于 create 语句，检测是否必须设置 character set 选项 if @domain.sqlType == 'CREATE_CATALOG' then
if cast(#{require} as bool) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{character_set}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
else
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.characterSet) then return true else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
end
end

#define "require" as bool default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "强制要求设置排序规则" #define "collate" as string default "utf8mb4_unicode_ci" enum ["utf8_unicode_ci", "utf8mb4_unicode_ci"] hint "允许使用的排序规则"
// 对于 alter 语句，只有当设置了 collate 选项时候才进行校验 if @domain.sqlType in ['ALTER_CATALOG'] and @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.collate) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{collate}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
end
// 对于 create 语句，检测是否必须设置 collate 选项 if @domain.sqlType == 'CREATE_CATALOG' then
if cast(#{require} as bool) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{collate}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
else
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.collate) then return true else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
end
end

#define "caseType" as string default "Lower case" enum ["Lower case", "Upper case", "Lower camel case", "Upper camel case"] hint "名称拼写规则"
if @domain.sqlType == 'CREATE_SCHEMA' then checkName = @domain.schema elseif @domain.sqlType == 'RENAME_SCHEMA' then checkName = @domain.newName else return true end
// ref document https://newbedev.com/regex-for-pascalcased-words-aka-camelcased-with-leading-uppercase-letter
if #{caseType} == 'Lower case' then return @func.string.lowerCase(checkName) == checkName
elseif #{caseType} == 'Upper case' then
return @func.string.upperCase(checkName) == checkName
elseif #{caseType} == 'Lower camel case' then return checkName matches '[a-z]+((\d)|([A-Z0-9][a-z0-9]+))*([A-Z])?'
elseif #{caseType} == 'Upper camel case' then return checkName matches '([A-Z][a-z0-9]+)((\d)|([A-Z0-9][a-z0-9]+))*([A-Z])?'
else
return false end

#define "checkMode" as string default "Allow" enum ["Allow", "Reject"] hint "名单规则" #define "commands" as string default "" hint "名单中的命令，多条使用分号分隔"
if @domain.dsType != 'Redis' then return true end
if #{checkMode} === 'Allow' then return @domain.command in @func.string.split(@func.string.upperCase(#{commands}),';') elseif #{checkMode} === 'Reject' then return @domain.command not in @func.string.split(@func.string.upperCase(#{commands}),';') else return true end

#define "checkMode" as string default "Allow" enum ["Allow", "Reject"] hint "名单规则" #define "functions" as string default "" hint "名单中的方法，通配符多条使用分号分隔"
if @domain.dsType != 'MongoDB' then return true end
if #{checkMode} === 'Allow' then return @domain.func in @func.string.split(#{functions},';') elseif #{checkMode} === 'Reject' then return @domain.func not in @func.string.split(#{functions},';') else return true end

#define "require" as bool default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "强制要求设置自增初始值" #define "number" as int default "1" hint "建表自增初始值"
if @domain.sqlType != 'CREATE_TABLE' then return true end
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.autoIncrement) then
return !cast(#{require} as bool)
else
if @func.string.isBlank(#{number}) then return false // 规则配置错误 else return cast(@domain.autoIncrement as int) == cast(#{number} as int) end
end

#define "caseType" as string default "Lower case" enum ["Lower case", "Upper case", "Lower camel case", "Upper camel case"] hint "表名拼写规则"
if @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE', 'CREATE_TABLE_SELECT', 'CREATE_TABLE_LIKE'] then checkName = @domain.table elseif @domain.sqlType in ['RENAME_TABLE', 'ALTER_TABLE_RENAME'] then checkName = @domain.newName else return true end
// ref document https://newbedev.com/regex-for-pascalcased-words-aka-camelcased-with-leading-uppercase-letter
if #{caseType} == 'Lower case' then return @func.string.lowerCase(checkName) == checkName
elseif #{caseType} == 'Upper case' then
return @func.string.upperCase(checkName) == checkName
elseif #{caseType} == 'Lower camel case' then return checkName matches '[a-z]+((\d)|([A-Z0-9][a-z0-9]+))*([A-Z])?'
elseif #{caseType} == 'Upper camel case' then return checkName matches '([A-Z][a-z0-9]+)((\d)|([A-Z0-9][a-z0-9]+))*([A-Z])?'
else
return false end
if @domain.sqlType == 'CREATE_TABLE' then return @domain.hasPrimary end

if @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE', 'CREATE_TABLE_SELECT', 'CREATE_TABLE_LIKE'] then testName = @domain.table elseif @domain.sqlType in ['RENAME_TABLE', 'ALTER_TABLE_RENAME'] then testName = @domain.newName elseif @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN'] then testName = @domain.column elseif @domain.sqlType == 'ALTER_TABLE_RENAME_COLUMN' then testName = @domain.newName else return true end
if @domain.dsType in ['MySQL', 'OceanBase', 'AdbForMySQL', 'PolarDbMySQL', 'PolarDbX'] then return @func.string.upperCase(testName) not in ['ACCESSIBLE','ADD','ALL','ALTER','ANALYZE','AND','AS','ASC','ASENSITIVE', 'BEFORE','BETWEEN','BIGINT','BINARY','BLOB','BOTH','BY', 'CALL','CASCADE','CASE','CHANGE','CHAR','CHARACTER','CHECK','COLLATE','COLUMN','CONDITION','CONSTRAINT','CONTINUE', 'CONVERT','CREATE','CROSS','CURRENT_DATE','CURRENT_TIME','CURRENT_TIMESTAMP','CURRENT_USER','CURSOR', 'DATABASE','DATABASES','DAY_HOUR','DAY_MICROSECOND','DAY_MINUTE','DAY_SECOND','DEC','DECIMAL','DECLARE','DEFAULT', 'DELAYED','DELETE','DESC','DESCRIBE','DETERMINISTIC','DISTINCT','DISTINCTROW','DIV','DOUBLE','DROP','DUAL', 'EACH','ELSE','ELSEIF','ENCLOSED','ESCAPED','EXISTS','EXIT','EXPLAIN', 'FALSE','FETCH','FLOAT','FLOAT4','FLOAT8','FOR','FORCE','FOREIGN','FROM','FULLTEXT','GENERATED','GET','GRANTint','GROUP', 'HAVING','HIGH_PRIORITY','HOUR_MICROSECOND','HOUR_MINUTE','HOUR_SECOND','IF','IGNORE','IN','INDEX','INFILE', 'INNER','INOUT','INSENSITIVE','INSERT','INT','INT1','INT2','INT3','INT4','INT8','INTEGER','INTERVALint','INTO', 'IO_AFTER_GTIDS','IO_BEFORE_GTIDS','IS','ITERATE','JOIN','KEY','KEYS','KILL','LEADING','LEAVE','LEFT','LIKE', 'LIMIT','LINEAR','LINES','LOAD','LOCALTIME','LOCALTIMESTAMP','LOCK','LONG','LONGBLOB','LONGTEXT','LOOP','LOW_PRIORITY', 'MASTER_BIND','MASTER_SSL_VERIFY_SERVER_CERT','MATCH','MAXVALUE','MEDIUMBLOB','MEDIUMINT','MEDIUMTEXT','MIDDLEINT', 'MINUTE_MICROSECOND','MINUTE_SECOND','MOD','MODIFIES','NATURAL','NOT','NO_WRITE_TO_BINLOG','NULL','NUMERIC', 'ON','OPTIMIZE','OPTIMIZER_COSTS','OPTION','OPTIONALLY','OR','ORDER','OUT','OUTER','OUTFILE','PARTITION','PRECISION', 'PRIMARY','PROCEDURE','PURGE','RANGE','READ','READS','READ_WRITE','REAL','REFERENCES','REGEXP','RELEASE','RENAME', 'REPEAT','REPLACE','REQUIRE','RESIGNAL','RESTRICT','RETURN','REVOKE','RIGHT','RLIKE','SCHEMA','SCHEMAS', 'SECOND_MICROSECOND','SELECT','SENSITIVE','SEPARATOR','SET','SHOW','SIGNAL','SMALLINT','SPATIAL','SPECIFIC', 'SQL','SQLEXCEPTION','SQLSTATE','SQLWARNING','SQL_BIG_RESULT','SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS','SQL_SMALL_RESULT','SSL', 'STARTING','STORED','STRAIGHT_JOIN','TABLE','TERMINATED','THEN','TINYBLOB','TINYINT','TINYTEXT','TO','TRAILING', 'TRIGGER','TRUE','UNDO','UNION','UNIQUE','UNLOCK','UNSIGNED','UPDATE','USAGE','USE','USING','UTC_DATE','UTC_TIME', 'UTC_TIMESTAMP','VALUES','VARBINARY','VARCHAR','VARCHARACTER','VARYING','VIRTUAL','WHEN','WHERE','WHILE','WITH', 'WRITE','XOR','YEAR_MONTH','ZEROFILL'] end
if @domain.dsType in ['PostgreSQL', 'Greenplum', 'PolarDBPg','GaussDBForOpenGauss','GaussDB'] then return @func.string.upperCase(testName) not in ['ALL','ALWAYS','ANALYSE','ANALYZE','AND','ANY','ARRAY','AS','ASC','ASYMMETRIC','AUTHORIZATION', 'BETWEEN','BINARY','BOTH','CASE','CAST','CHECK','COLLATE','COLLATION','COLUMN','CONCURRENTLY','CONSTRAINT', 'CREATE','CROSS','CURRENT_DATE','CURRENT_ROLE','CURRENT_TIME','CURRENT_TIMESTAMP','CURRENT_USER','DEFAULT', 'DEFERRABLE','DESC','DISTINCT','DO','ELSE','END','END-EXEC','EXCEPT','FALSE','FETCH','FOR','FOREIGN','FREEZE', 'FROM','FULL','GRANT','GROUP','HAVING','ILIKE','IN','INITIALLY','INNER','INTERSECT','INTO','IS','ISNULL', 'JOIN','LATERAL','LEADING','LEFT','LIKE','LIMIT','LOCALTIME','LOCALTIMESTAMP','NATURAL','NOT','NOTNULL','NULL', 'OFFSET','ON','ONLY','OR','ORDER','OUTER','OVERLAPS','PLACING','PRIMARY','REFERENCES','RETURNING','RIGHT', 'SELECT','SESSION_USER','SIMILAR','SOME','SYMMETRIC','TABLE','TABLESAMPLE','THEN','TO','TRAILING','TRUE', 'UNION','UNIQUE','USER','USING','VERBOSE','WHEN','WHERE','WINDOW','WITH'] end
if @domain.dsType in ['TiDB'] then return @func.string.upperCase(testName) not in ['ACCOUNT','ACTION','ADD','ADMIN','ADVISE','AFTER','AGAINST','AGO','ALGORITHM','ALL','ALTER','ALWAYS','ANALYZE','AND','ANY', 'ARRAY','AS','ASC','ASCII','ATTRIBUTE','ATTRIBUTES','AUTO_ID_CACHE','AUTO_INCREMENT','AUTO_RANDOM','AUTO_RANDOM_BASE','AVG', 'AVG_ROW_LENGTH','BACKEND','BACKUP','BACKUPS','BATCH','BDR','BEGIN','BERNOULLI','BETWEEN','BIGINT','BINARY','BINDING','BINDINGS', 'BINDING_CACHE','BINLOG','BIT','BLOB','BLOCK','BOOL','BOOLEAN','BOTH','BTREE','BUCKETS','BUILTINS','BY','BYTE','CACHE','CALIBRATE', 'CALL','CANCEL','CAPTURE','CARDINALITY','CASCADE','CASCADED','CASE','CAUSAL','CHAIN','CHANGE','CHAR','CHARACTER','CHARSET','CHECK', 'CHECKPOINT','CHECKSUM','CIPHER','CLEANUP','CLIENT','CLIENT_ERRORS_SUMMARY','CLOSE','CLUSTER','CLUSTERED','CMSKETCH','COALESCE', 'COLLATE','COLLATION','COLUMN','COLUMN_FORMAT','COLUMN_STATS_USAGE','COLUMNS','COMMENT','COMMIT','COMMITTED','COMPACT','COMPRESSED', 'COMPRESSION','CONCURRENCY','CONFIG','CONNECTION','CONSISTENCY','CONSISTENT','CONSTRAINT','CONTEXT','CONTINUE','CONVERT', 'CORRELATION','CPU','CREATE','CROSS','CSV_BACKSLASH_ESCAPE','CSV_DELIMITER','CSV_HEADER','CSV_NOT_NULL','CSV_NULL','CSV_SEPARATOR', 'CSV_TRIM_LAST_SEPARATORS','CUME_DIST','CURRENT','CURRENT_DATE','CURRENT_ROLE','CURRENT_TIME','CURRENT_TIMESTAMP','CURRENT_USER', 'CURSOR','CYCLE','DATA','DATABASE','DATABASES','DATE','DATETIME','DAY','DAY_HOUR','DAY_MICROSECOND','DAY_MINUTE','DAY_SECOND', 'DDL','DEALLOCATE','DECIMAL','DECLARE','DEFAULT','DEFINER','DELAY_KEY_WRITE','DELAYED','DELETE','DENSE_RANK','DEPENDENCY','DEPTH', 'DESC','DESCRIBE','DIGEST','DIRECTORY','DISABLE','DISABLED','DISCARD','DISK','DISTINCT','DISTINCTROW','DIV','DO','DOUBLE', 'DRAINER','DROP','DRY','DUAL','DUPLICATE','DYNAMIC','ELSE','ELSEIF','ENABLE','ENABLED','ENCLOSED','ENCRYPTION','END','ENFORCED', 'ENGINE','ENGINES','ENUM','ERROR','ERRORS','ESCAPE','ESCAPED','EVENT','EVENTS','EVOLVE','EXCEPT','EXCHANGE','EXCLUSIVE', 'EXECUTE','EXISTS','EXIT','EXPANSION','EXPIRE','EXPLAIN','EXTENDED','FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS','FALSE','FAULTS','FETCH','FIELDS', 'FILE','FIRST','FIRST_VALUE','FIXED','FLOAT','FLOAT4','FLOAT8','FLUSH','FOLLOWING','FOR','FORCE','FOREIGN','FORMAT','FOUND', 'FROM','FULL','FULLTEXT','FUNCTION','GENERAL','GENERATED','GLOBAL','GRANT','GRANTS','GROUP','GROUPS','HANDLER','HASH','HAVING', 'HELP','HIGH_PRIORITY','HISTOGRAM','HISTOGRAMS_IN_FLIGHT','HISTORY','HOSTS','HOUR','HOUR_MICROSECOND','HOUR_MINUTE','HOUR_SECOND', 'HYPO','IDENTIFIED','IF','IGNORE','ILIKE','IMPORT','IMPORTS','IN','INCREMENT','INCREMENTAL','INDEX','INDEXES','INFILE','INNER', 'INOUT','INSERT','INSERT_METHOD','INSTANCE','INT','INT1','INT2','INT3','INT4','INT8','INTEGER','INTERSECT','INTERVAL','INTO', 'INVISIBLE','INVOKER','IO','IPC','IS','ISOLATION','ISSUER','ITERATE','JOB','JOBS','JOIN','JSON','KEY','KEYS','KEY_BLOCK_SIZE', 'KILL','LABELS','LAG','LANGUAGE','LAST','LAST_BACKUP','LAST_VALUE','LASTVAL','LEAD','LEADING','LEAVE','LEFT','LESS','LEVEL', 'LIKE','LIMIT','LINEAR','LINES','LIST','LOAD','LOCAL','LOCALTIME','LOCALTIMESTAMP','LOCATION','LOCK','LOCKED','LOGS','LONG', 'LONGBLOB','LONGTEXT','LOW_PRIORITY','MASTER','MATCH','MAXVALUE','MAX_CONNECTIONS_PER_HOUR','MAX_IDXNUM','MAX_MINUTES', 'MAX_QUERIES_PER_HOUR','MAX_ROWS','MAX_UPDATES_PER_HOUR','MAX_USER_CONNECTIONS','MB','MEDIUMBLOB','MEDIUMINT','MEDIUMTEXT', 'MEMBER','MEMORY','MERGE','MICROSECOND','MIDDLEINT','MINUTE','MINUTE_MICROSECOND','MINUTE_SECOND','MINVALUE','MIN_ROWS','MOD', 'MODE','MODIFY','MONTH','NAMES','NATIONAL','NATURAL','NCHAR','NEVER','NEXT','NEXTVAL','NO','NOCACHE','NOCYCLE','NODEGROUP', 'NODE_ID','NODE_STATE','NOMAXVALUE','NOMINVALUE','NONCLUSTERED','NONE','NOT','NOWAIT','NO_WRITE_TO_BINLOG','NTH_VALUE','NTILE', 'NULL','NULLS','NUMERIC','NVARCHAR','OF','OFF','OFFSET','OLTP_READ_ONLY','OLTP_READ_WRITE','OLTP_WRITE_ONLY','ON','ON_DUPLICATE', 'ONLINE','ONLY','OPEN','OPTIMISTIC','OPTIMIZE','OPTION','OPTIONAL','OPTIONALLY','OR','ORDER','OUT','OUTER','OUTFILE','OVER', 'PACK_KEYS','PAGE','PARSER','PARTIAL','PARTITION','PARTITIONING','PARTITIONS','PASSWORD','PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME','PAUSE','PERCENT', 'PERCENT_RANK','PER_DB','PER_TABLE','PESSIMISTIC','PLUGINS','POINT','POLICY','PRECEDING','PRECISION','PREPARE','PRESERVE', 'PRE_SPLIT_REGIONS','PRIMARY','PRIVILEGES','PROCEDURE','PROCESS','PROCESSLIST','PROFILE','PROFILES','PROXY','PUMP','PURGE', 'QUARTER','QUERIES','QUERY','QUICK','RANGE','RANK','RATE_LIMIT','READ','REAL','REBUILD','RECOVER','RECURSIVE','REDUNDANT', 'REFERENCES','REGEXP','REGION','REGIONS','RELEASE','RELOAD','REMOVE','RENAME','REORGANIZE','REPAIR','REPEAT','REPEATABLE', 'REPLACE','REPLICA','REPLICAS','REPLICATION','REQUIRE','REQUIRED','RESET','RESOURCE','RESPECT','RESTART','RESTORE','RESTORES', 'RESTRICT','RESUME','REUSE','REVERSE','REVOKE','RIGHT','RLIKE','ROLE','ROLLBACK','ROLLUP','ROUTINE','ROW','ROW_COUNT','ROW_FORMAT', 'ROW_NUMBER','ROWS','RTREE','RUN','SAMPLERATE','SAMPLES','SAN','SAVEPOINT','SECOND','SECOND_MICROSECOND','SECONDARY','SECONDARY_ENGINE', 'SECONDARY_LOAD','SECONDARY_UNLOAD','SECURITY','SELECT','SEND_CREDENTIALS_TO_TIKV','SEPARATOR','SEQUENCE','SERIAL','SERIALIZABLE', 'SESSION','SESSION_STATES','SET','SETVAL','SHARD_ROW_ID_BITS','SHARE','SHARED','SHOW','SHUTDOWN','SIGNED','SIMPLE','SKIP', 'SKIP_SCHEMA_FILES','SLAVE','SLOW','SMALLINT','SNAPSHOT','SOME','SOURCE','SPATIAL','SPLIT','SQL','SQL_BIG_RESULT','SQL_BUFFER_RESULT', 'SQL_CACHE','SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS','SQL_NO_CACHE','SQL_SMALL_RESULT','SQL_TSI_DAY','SQL_TSI_HOUR','SQL_TSI_MINUTE','SQL_TSI_MONTH', 'SQL_TSI_QUARTER','SQL_TSI_SECOND','SQL_TSI_WEEK','SQL_TSI_YEAR','SQLEXCEPTION','SQLSTATE','SQLWARNING','SSL','START','STARTING', 'STATISTICS','STATS','STATS_AUTO_RECALC','STATS_BUCKETS','STATS_COL_CHOICE','STATS_COL_LIST','STATS_EXTENDED','STATS_HEALTHY', 'STATS_HISTOGRAMS','STATS_LOCKED','STATS_META','STATS_OPTIONS','STATS_PERSISTENT','STATS_SAMPLE_PAGES','STATS_SAMPLE_RATE', 'STATS_TOPN','STATUS','STORAGE','STORED','STRAIGHT_JOIN','STRICT_FORMAT','SUBJECT','SUBPARTITION','SUBPARTITIONS','SUPER', 'SWAPS','SWITCHES','SYSTEM','SYSTEM_TIME','TABLE','TABLES','TABLESAMPLE','TABLESPACE','TABLE_CHECKSUM','TELEMETRY','TELEMETRY_ID', 'TEMPORARY','TEMPTABLE','TERMINATED','TEXT','THAN','THEN','TIDB','TiDB_CURRENT_TSO','TIFLASH','TIKV_IMPORTER','TIME','TIMESTAMP', 'TINYBLOB','TINYINT','TINYTEXT','TO','TOKEN_ISSUER','TOPN','TPCC','TPCH_10','TRACE','TRADITIONAL','TRAILING','TRANSACTION', 'TRIGGER','TRIGGERS','TRUE','TRUNCATE','TSO','TTL','TTL_ENABLE','TTL_JOB_INTERVAL','TYPE','UNBOUNDED','UNCOMMITTED','UNDEFINED', 'UNICODE','UNION','UNIQUE','UNKNOWN','UNLOCK','UNSET','UNSIGNED','UNTIL','UPDATE','USAGE','USE','USER','USING','UTC_DATE','UTC_TIME', 'UTC_TIMESTAMP','VALIDATION','VALUE','VALUES','VARBINARY','VARCHAR','VARCHARACTER','VARIABLES','VARYING','VIEW','VIRTUAL','VISIBLE', 'WAIT','WARNINGS','WEEK','WEIGHT_STRING','WHEN','WHERE','WHILE','WIDTH','WINDOW','WITH','WITHOUT','WORKLOAD','WRITE','X509','XOR', 'YEAR','YEAR_MONTH','ZEROFILL'] end

#define "require" as bool default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "强制要求设置字符集" #define "character_set" as string default "utf8mb4" enum ["utf8", "utf8mb4"] hint "允许使用的字符集"
// 对于 ALTER 语句，只有当设置了 character set 选项时候才进行校验 if @domain.sqlType in ['ALTER_TABLE', 'ALTER_TABLE_CONVERT'] and @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.characterSet) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{character_set}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
end
// 对于 create 语句，检测是否必须设置 character set 选项 if @domain.sqlType == 'CREATE_TABLE' then
if cast(#{require} as bool) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{character_set}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
else
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.characterSet) then return true else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
end
end

#define "require" as bool default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "强制要求设置排序规则" #define "collate" as string default "utf8mb4_unicode_ci" enum ["utf8_unicode_ci", "utf8mb4_unicode_ci"] hint "允许使用的排序规则"
// 对于 ALTER 语句，只有当设置了 collate 选项时候才进行校验 if @domain.sqlType in ['ALTER_TABLE', 'ALTER_TABLE_CONVERT'] and @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.collate) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{collate}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
end
// 对于 create 语句，检测是否必须设置 collate 选项 if @domain.sqlType == 'CREATE_TABLE' then
if cast(#{require} as bool) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{collate}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
else
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.collate) then return true else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
end
end

#define "require" as bool default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "强制要求指定存储引擎" #define "engine" as string default "InnoDB" enum ["InnoDB", "MyISAM", "Memory"] hint "允许使用的存储引擎"
// 对于 ALTER 语句，只有当设置了 engine 选项时候才进行校验 if @domain.sqlType in ['ALTER_TABLE', 'ALTER_TABLE_CONVERT'] and @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.engine) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{engine}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.engine, #{engine}) end
end
// 对于 create 语句，检测是否必须设置 engine 选项 if @domain.sqlType == 'CREATE_TABLE' then
if cast(#{require} as bool) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{engine}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.engine, #{engine}) end
else
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.engine) then return true else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.engine, #{engine}) end
end
end

#define "columns" as string default "id,create_gmt,modify_gmt" hint "需要包含的列名称，多个列使用逗号区分"
if @domain.sqlType != 'CREATE_TABLE' then return true end
return @func.string.split(#{columns}, ',') in @domain.columns

if @domain.sqlType != 'ALTER_TABLE' then return true end
if @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.collate) or @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.characterSet) then return false end

#define "require" as bool default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "强制要求设置字符集" #define "character_set" as string default "utf8mb4" enum ["utf8", "utf8mb4"] hint "允许使用的字符集"
// 对于 modify/change 语句，只有当设置了 character set 选项时候才进行校验 if @domain.sqlType == 'ALTER_TABLE_ALTER_COLUMN' and @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.characterSet) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{character_set}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
end
// 对于 add column or create table 语句，检测是否必须设置 character set 选项 if @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN'] then
if cast(#{require} as bool) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{character_set}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
else
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.characterSet) then return true else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.characterSet, #{character_set}) end
end
end

#define "require" as bool default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "强制要求设置排序规则" #define "collate" as string default "utf8mb4_unicode_ci" enum ["utf8_unicode_ci", "utf8mb4_unicode_ci"] hint "允许使用的排序规则"
// 对于 modify/change 语句，只有当设置了 collate 选项时候才进行校验 if @domain.sqlType == 'ALTER_TABLE_ALTER_COLUMN' and @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.collate) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{collate}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
end
// 对于 add column or create table 语句，检测是否必须设置 collate 选项 if @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN'] then
if cast(#{require} as bool) then
if @func.string.isBlank(#{collate}) then return false //规则配置错误 else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
else
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.collate) then return true else return @func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.collate, #{collate}) end
end
end

#define "allow" as string default "Both" enum ["Nothing", "Both", "Character set", "Collate"] hint "是否允许字符集和排序规则出现在列上"
if @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ALTER_COLUMN'] then
if @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.characterSet) then if #{allow} not in ['Both', 'Character set'] then return false end end
if @func.string.isNotBlank(@domain.collate) then if #{allow} not in ['Both', 'Collate'] then return false end end
end

if @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE', 'CREATE_TABLE_SELECT', 'CREATE_TABLE_LIKE'] then testName = @domain.table elseif @domain.sqlType in ['RENAME_TABLE', 'ALTER_TABLE_RENAME'] then testName = @domain.newName elseif @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN'] then testName = @domain.column elseif @domain.sqlType == 'ALTER_TABLE_RENAME_COLUMN' then testName = @domain.newName else return true end
if @domain.dsType in ['MySQL', 'OceanBase', 'AdbForMySQL', 'PolarDbMySQL', 'PolarDbX'] then return @func.string.upperCase(testName) not in ['ACCESSIBLE','ADD','ALL','ALTER','ANALYZE','AND','AS','ASC','ASENSITIVE', 'BEFORE','BETWEEN','BIGINT','BINARY','BLOB','BOTH','BY', 'CALL','CASCADE','CASE','CHANGE','CHAR','CHARACTER','CHECK','COLLATE','COLUMN','CONDITION','CONSTRAINT','CONTINUE', 'CONVERT','CREATE','CROSS','CURRENT_DATE','CURRENT_TIME','CURRENT_TIMESTAMP','CURRENT_USER','CURSOR', 'DATABASE','DATABASES','DAY_HOUR','DAY_MICROSECOND','DAY_MINUTE','DAY_SECOND','DEC','DECIMAL','DECLARE','DEFAULT', 'DELAYED','DELETE','DESC','DESCRIBE','DETERMINISTIC','DISTINCT','DISTINCTROW','DIV','DOUBLE','DROP','DUAL', 'EACH','ELSE','ELSEIF','ENCLOSED','ESCAPED','EXISTS','EXIT','EXPLAIN', 'FALSE','FETCH','FLOAT','FLOAT4','FLOAT8','FOR','FORCE','FOREIGN','FROM','FULLTEXT','GENERATED','GET','GRANTint','GROUP', 'HAVING','HIGH_PRIORITY','HOUR_MICROSECOND','HOUR_MINUTE','HOUR_SECOND','IF','IGNORE','IN','INDEX','INFILE', 'INNER','INOUT','INSENSITIVE','INSERT','INT','INT1','INT2','INT3','INT4','INT8','INTEGER','INTERVALint','INTO', 'IO_AFTER_GTIDS','IO_BEFORE_GTIDS','IS','ITERATE','JOIN','KEY','KEYS','KILL','LEADING','LEAVE','LEFT','LIKE', 'LIMIT','LINEAR','LINES','LOAD','LOCALTIME','LOCALTIMESTAMP','LOCK','LONG','LONGBLOB','LONGTEXT','LOOP','LOW_PRIORITY', 'MASTER_BIND','MASTER_SSL_VERIFY_SERVER_CERT','MATCH','MAXVALUE','MEDIUMBLOB','MEDIUMINT','MEDIUMTEXT','MIDDLEINT', 'MINUTE_MICROSECOND','MINUTE_SECOND','MOD','MODIFIES','NATURAL','NOT','NO_WRITE_TO_BINLOG','NULL','NUMERIC', 'ON','OPTIMIZE','OPTIMIZER_COSTS','OPTION','OPTIONALLY','OR','ORDER','OUT','OUTER','OUTFILE','PARTITION','PRECISION', 'PRIMARY','PROCEDURE','PURGE','RANGE','READ','READS','READ_WRITE','REAL','REFERENCES','REGEXP','RELEASE','RENAME', 'REPEAT','REPLACE','REQUIRE','RESIGNAL','RESTRICT','RETURN','REVOKE','RIGHT','RLIKE','SCHEMA','SCHEMAS', 'SECOND_MICROSECOND','SELECT','SENSITIVE','SEPARATOR','SET','SHOW','SIGNAL','SMALLINT','SPATIAL','SPECIFIC', 'SQL','SQLEXCEPTION','SQLSTATE','SQLWARNING','SQL_BIG_RESULT','SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS','SQL_SMALL_RESULT','SSL', 'STARTING','STORED','STRAIGHT_JOIN','TABLE','TERMINATED','THEN','TINYBLOB','TINYINT','TINYTEXT','TO','TRAILING', 'TRIGGER','TRUE','UNDO','UNION','UNIQUE','UNLOCK','UNSIGNED','UPDATE','USAGE','USE','USING','UTC_DATE','UTC_TIME', 'UTC_TIMESTAMP','VALUES','VARBINARY','VARCHAR','VARCHARACTER','VARYING','VIRTUAL','WHEN','WHERE','WHILE','WITH', 'WRITE','XOR','YEAR_MONTH','ZEROFILL'] end
if @domain.dsType in ['PostgreSQL', 'Greenplum', 'PolarDBPg','GaussDBForOpenGauss','GaussDB'] then return @func.string.upperCase(testName) not in ['ALL','ALWAYS','ANALYSE','ANALYZE','AND','ANY','ARRAY','AS','ASC','ASYMMETRIC','AUTHORIZATION', 'BETWEEN','BINARY','BOTH','CASE','CAST','CHECK','COLLATE','COLLATION','COLUMN','CONCURRENTLY','CONSTRAINT', 'CREATE','CROSS','CURRENT_DATE','CURRENT_ROLE','CURRENT_TIME','CURRENT_TIMESTAMP','CURRENT_USER','DEFAULT', 'DEFERRABLE','DESC','DISTINCT','DO','ELSE','END','END-EXEC','EXCEPT','FALSE','FETCH','FOR','FOREIGN','FREEZE', 'FROM','FULL','GRANT','GROUP','HAVING','ILIKE','IN','INITIALLY','INNER','INTERSECT','INTO','IS','ISNULL', 'JOIN','LATERAL','LEADING','LEFT','LIKE','LIMIT','LOCALTIME','LOCALTIMESTAMP','NATURAL','NOT','NOTNULL','NULL', 'OFFSET','ON','ONLY','OR','ORDER','OUTER','OVERLAPS','PLACING','PRIMARY','REFERENCES','RETURNING','RIGHT', 'SELECT','SESSION_USER','SIMILAR','SOME','SYMMETRIC','TABLE','TABLESAMPLE','THEN','TO','TRAILING','TRUE', 'UNION','UNIQUE','USER','USING','VERBOSE','WHEN','WHERE','WINDOW','WITH'] end
if @domain.dsType in ['TiDB'] then return @func.string.upperCase(testName) not in ['ACCOUNT','ACTION','ADD','ADMIN','ADVISE','AFTER','AGAINST','AGO','ALGORITHM','ALL','ALTER','ALWAYS','ANALYZE','AND','ANY', 'ARRAY','AS','ASC','ASCII','ATTRIBUTE','ATTRIBUTES','AUTO_ID_CACHE','AUTO_INCREMENT','AUTO_RANDOM','AUTO_RANDOM_BASE','AVG', 'AVG_ROW_LENGTH','BACKEND','BACKUP','BACKUPS','BATCH','BDR','BEGIN','BERNOULLI','BETWEEN','BIGINT','BINARY','BINDING','BINDINGS', 'BINDING_CACHE','BINLOG','BIT','BLOB','BLOCK','BOOL','BOOLEAN','BOTH','BTREE','BUCKETS','BUILTINS','BY','BYTE','CACHE','CALIBRATE', 'CALL','CANCEL','CAPTURE','CARDINALITY','CASCADE','CASCADED','CASE','CAUSAL','CHAIN','CHANGE','CHAR','CHARACTER','CHARSET','CHECK', 'CHECKPOINT','CHECKSUM','CIPHER','CLEANUP','CLIENT','CLIENT_ERRORS_SUMMARY','CLOSE','CLUSTER','CLUSTERED','CMSKETCH','COALESCE', 'COLLATE','COLLATION','COLUMN','COLUMN_FORMAT','COLUMN_STATS_USAGE','COLUMNS','COMMENT','COMMIT','COMMITTED','COMPACT','COMPRESSED', 'COMPRESSION','CONCURRENCY','CONFIG','CONNECTION','CONSISTENCY','CONSISTENT','CONSTRAINT','CONTEXT','CONTINUE','CONVERT', 'CORRELATION','CPU','CREATE','CROSS','CSV_BACKSLASH_ESCAPE','CSV_DELIMITER','CSV_HEADER','CSV_NOT_NULL','CSV_NULL','CSV_SEPARATOR', 'CSV_TRIM_LAST_SEPARATORS','CUME_DIST','CURRENT','CURRENT_DATE','CURRENT_ROLE','CURRENT_TIME','CURRENT_TIMESTAMP','CURRENT_USER', 'CURSOR','CYCLE','DATA','DATABASE','DATABASES','DATE','DATETIME','DAY','DAY_HOUR','DAY_MICROSECOND','DAY_MINUTE','DAY_SECOND', 'DDL','DEALLOCATE','DECIMAL','DECLARE','DEFAULT','DEFINER','DELAY_KEY_WRITE','DELAYED','DELETE','DENSE_RANK','DEPENDENCY','DEPTH', 'DESC','DESCRIBE','DIGEST','DIRECTORY','DISABLE','DISABLED','DISCARD','DISK','DISTINCT','DISTINCTROW','DIV','DO','DOUBLE', 'DRAINER','DROP','DRY','DUAL','DUPLICATE','DYNAMIC','ELSE','ELSEIF','ENABLE','ENABLED','ENCLOSED','ENCRYPTION','END','ENFORCED', 'ENGINE','ENGINES','ENUM','ERROR','ERRORS','ESCAPE','ESCAPED','EVENT','EVENTS','EVOLVE','EXCEPT','EXCHANGE','EXCLUSIVE', 'EXECUTE','EXISTS','EXIT','EXPANSION','EXPIRE','EXPLAIN','EXTENDED','FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS','FALSE','FAULTS','FETCH','FIELDS', 'FILE','FIRST','FIRST_VALUE','FIXED','FLOAT','FLOAT4','FLOAT8','FLUSH','FOLLOWING','FOR','FORCE','FOREIGN','FORMAT','FOUND', 'FROM','FULL','FULLTEXT','FUNCTION','GENERAL','GENERATED','GLOBAL','GRANT','GRANTS','GROUP','GROUPS','HANDLER','HASH','HAVING', 'HELP','HIGH_PRIORITY','HISTOGRAM','HISTOGRAMS_IN_FLIGHT','HISTORY','HOSTS','HOUR','HOUR_MICROSECOND','HOUR_MINUTE','HOUR_SECOND', 'HYPO','IDENTIFIED','IF','IGNORE','ILIKE','IMPORT','IMPORTS','IN','INCREMENT','INCREMENTAL','INDEX','INDEXES','INFILE','INNER', 'INOUT','INSERT','INSERT_METHOD','INSTANCE','INT','INT1','INT2','INT3','INT4','INT8','INTEGER','INTERSECT','INTERVAL','INTO', 'INVISIBLE','INVOKER','IO','IPC','IS','ISOLATION','ISSUER','ITERATE','JOB','JOBS','JOIN','JSON','KEY','KEYS','KEY_BLOCK_SIZE', 'KILL','LABELS','LAG','LANGUAGE','LAST','LAST_BACKUP','LAST_VALUE','LASTVAL','LEAD','LEADING','LEAVE','LEFT','LESS','LEVEL', 'LIKE','LIMIT','LINEAR','LINES','LIST','LOAD','LOCAL','LOCALTIME','LOCALTIMESTAMP','LOCATION','LOCK','LOCKED','LOGS','LONG', 'LONGBLOB','LONGTEXT','LOW_PRIORITY','MASTER','MATCH','MAXVALUE','MAX_CONNECTIONS_PER_HOUR','MAX_IDXNUM','MAX_MINUTES', 'MAX_QUERIES_PER_HOUR','MAX_ROWS','MAX_UPDATES_PER_HOUR','MAX_USER_CONNECTIONS','MB','MEDIUMBLOB','MEDIUMINT','MEDIUMTEXT', 'MEMBER','MEMORY','MERGE','MICROSECOND','MIDDLEINT','MINUTE','MINUTE_MICROSECOND','MINUTE_SECOND','MINVALUE','MIN_ROWS','MOD', 'MODE','MODIFY','MONTH','NAMES','NATIONAL','NATURAL','NCHAR','NEVER','NEXT','NEXTVAL','NO','NOCACHE','NOCYCLE','NODEGROUP', 'NODE_ID','NODE_STATE','NOMAXVALUE','NOMINVALUE','NONCLUSTERED','NONE','NOT','NOWAIT','NO_WRITE_TO_BINLOG','NTH_VALUE','NTILE', 'NULL','NULLS','NUMERIC','NVARCHAR','OF','OFF','OFFSET','OLTP_READ_ONLY','OLTP_READ_WRITE','OLTP_WRITE_ONLY','ON','ON_DUPLICATE', 'ONLINE','ONLY','OPEN','OPTIMISTIC','OPTIMIZE','OPTION','OPTIONAL','OPTIONALLY','OR','ORDER','OUT','OUTER','OUTFILE','OVER', 'PACK_KEYS','PAGE','PARSER','PARTIAL','PARTITION','PARTITIONING','PARTITIONS','PASSWORD','PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME','PAUSE','PERCENT', 'PERCENT_RANK','PER_DB','PER_TABLE','PESSIMISTIC','PLUGINS','POINT','POLICY','PRECEDING','PRECISION','PREPARE','PRESERVE', 'PRE_SPLIT_REGIONS','PRIMARY','PRIVILEGES','PROCEDURE','PROCESS','PROCESSLIST','PROFILE','PROFILES','PROXY','PUMP','PURGE', 'QUARTER','QUERIES','QUERY','QUICK','RANGE','RANK','RATE_LIMIT','READ','REAL','REBUILD','RECOVER','RECURSIVE','REDUNDANT', 'REFERENCES','REGEXP','REGION','REGIONS','RELEASE','RELOAD','REMOVE','RENAME','REORGANIZE','REPAIR','REPEAT','REPEATABLE', 'REPLACE','REPLICA','REPLICAS','REPLICATION','REQUIRE','REQUIRED','RESET','RESOURCE','RESPECT','RESTART','RESTORE','RESTORES', 'RESTRICT','RESUME','REUSE','REVERSE','REVOKE','RIGHT','RLIKE','ROLE','ROLLBACK','ROLLUP','ROUTINE','ROW','ROW_COUNT','ROW_FORMAT', 'ROW_NUMBER','ROWS','RTREE','RUN','SAMPLERATE','SAMPLES','SAN','SAVEPOINT','SECOND','SECOND_MICROSECOND','SECONDARY','SECONDARY_ENGINE', 'SECONDARY_LOAD','SECONDARY_UNLOAD','SECURITY','SELECT','SEND_CREDENTIALS_TO_TIKV','SEPARATOR','SEQUENCE','SERIAL','SERIALIZABLE', 'SESSION','SESSION_STATES','SET','SETVAL','SHARD_ROW_ID_BITS','SHARE','SHARED','SHOW','SHUTDOWN','SIGNED','SIMPLE','SKIP', 'SKIP_SCHEMA_FILES','SLAVE','SLOW','SMALLINT','SNAPSHOT','SOME','SOURCE','SPATIAL','SPLIT','SQL','SQL_BIG_RESULT','SQL_BUFFER_RESULT', 'SQL_CACHE','SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS','SQL_NO_CACHE','SQL_SMALL_RESULT','SQL_TSI_DAY','SQL_TSI_HOUR','SQL_TSI_MINUTE','SQL_TSI_MONTH', 'SQL_TSI_QUARTER','SQL_TSI_SECOND','SQL_TSI_WEEK','SQL_TSI_YEAR','SQLEXCEPTION','SQLSTATE','SQLWARNING','SSL','START','STARTING', 'STATISTICS','STATS','STATS_AUTO_RECALC','STATS_BUCKETS','STATS_COL_CHOICE','STATS_COL_LIST','STATS_EXTENDED','STATS_HEALTHY', 'STATS_HISTOGRAMS','STATS_LOCKED','STATS_META','STATS_OPTIONS','STATS_PERSISTENT','STATS_SAMPLE_PAGES','STATS_SAMPLE_RATE', 'STATS_TOPN','STATUS','STORAGE','STORED','STRAIGHT_JOIN','STRICT_FORMAT','SUBJECT','SUBPARTITION','SUBPARTITIONS','SUPER', 'SWAPS','SWITCHES','SYSTEM','SYSTEM_TIME','TABLE','TABLES','TABLESAMPLE','TABLESPACE','TABLE_CHECKSUM','TELEMETRY','TELEMETRY_ID', 'TEMPORARY','TEMPTABLE','TERMINATED','TEXT','THAN','THEN','TIDB','TiDB_CURRENT_TSO','TIFLASH','TIKV_IMPORTER','TIME','TIMESTAMP', 'TINYBLOB','TINYINT','TINYTEXT','TO','TOKEN_ISSUER','TOPN','TPCC','TPCH_10','TRACE','TRADITIONAL','TRAILING','TRANSACTION', 'TRIGGER','TRIGGERS','TRUE','TRUNCATE','TSO','TTL','TTL_ENABLE','TTL_JOB_INTERVAL','TYPE','UNBOUNDED','UNCOMMITTED','UNDEFINED', 'UNICODE','UNION','UNIQUE','UNKNOWN','UNLOCK','UNSET','UNSIGNED','UNTIL','UPDATE','USAGE','USE','USER','USING','UTC_DATE','UTC_TIME', 'UTC_TIMESTAMP','VALIDATION','VALUE','VALUES','VARBINARY','VARCHAR','VARCHARACTER','VARIABLES','VARYING','VIEW','VIRTUAL','VISIBLE', 'WAIT','WARNINGS','WEEK','WEIGHT_STRING','WHEN','WHERE','WHILE','WIDTH','WINDOW','WITH','WITHOUT','WORKLOAD','WRITE','X509','XOR', 'YEAR','YEAR_MONTH','ZEROFILL'] end

#define "caseType" as string default "Lower case" enum ["Lower case", "Upper case", "Lower camel case", "Upper camel case"] hint "列名拼写规则"
if @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN'] then checkName = @domain.column elseif @domain.sqlType == 'ALTER_TABLE_RENAME_COLUMN' then checkName = @domain.newName else return true end
// ref document https://newbedev.com/regex-for-pascalcased-words-aka-camelcased-with-leading-uppercase-letter
if #{caseType} == 'Lower case' then return @func.string.lowerCase(checkName) == checkName
elseif #{caseType} == 'Upper case' then
return @func.string.upperCase(checkName) == checkName
elseif #{caseType} == 'Lower camel case' then return checkName matches '[a-z]+((\d)|([A-Z0-9][a-z0-9]+))*([A-Z])?'
elseif #{caseType} == 'Upper camel case' then return checkName matches '([A-Z][a-z0-9]+)((\d)|([A-Z0-9][a-z0-9]+))*([A-Z])?'
else
return false end

#define "allowEmpty" as bool default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "是否允许空长度" #define "length" as int default "120" hint "字段最大长度"
if @domain.sqlType not in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ALTER_COLUMN'] then return true end
if @func.string.startsWith(@domain.typeDesc, "char") or @func.string.startsWith(@domain.typeDesc, "nchar") then
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.length) and cast(#{allowEmpty} as bool) then return true end
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.length) then return false // 语句中长度为空，例如 create table abc(name char); else return cast(@domain.length as int) <= cast(#{length} as int) end
end

#define "allowEmpty" as bool default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "是否允许空长度" #define "length" as int default "500" hint "字段最大长度"
if @domain.sqlType not in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ALTER_COLUMN'] then return true end
if @func.string.startsWith(@domain.typeDesc, "varchar") or @func.string.startsWith(@domain.typeDesc, "nvarchar") then
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.length) and cast(#{allowEmpty} as bool) then return true end
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.length) then return false // 语句中长度为空，例如 create table abc(name varchar); else return cast(@domain.length as int) <= cast(#{length} as int) end
end

#define "allow" as string default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "是否允许删除列"
if @domain.sqlType == 'ALTER_TABLE_DROP_COLUMN' and !cast(#{allow} as bool) then return false end

#define "ruleType" as string default "AllowList" enum ["AllowList", "BlockList"] hint "名单工作模式" #define "typeList" as string default "bit,tinyint,smallint,mediumint,int,integer,bigint,decimal,numeric,float,double,date,datetime,timestamp,time,char,varchar,binary,tinyblob,blob,mediumblob,longblob,tinytext,text,mediumtext,longtext,enum,set,json" hint "允许或禁止的类型列表"
if @domain.sqlType not in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ALTER_COLUMN'] then return true end
if @func.string.isBlank(#{typeList}) then return true end
if #{ruleType} == 'AllowList' then return @domain.typeName in @func.string.split(#{typeList}, ',') end
if #{ruleType} == 'BlockList' then return @domain.typeName not in @func.string.split(#{typeList}, ',') end
return false
if @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ALTER_COLUMN'] then return !@domain.nullable end

#define "columnName" as string default "id" hint "自增的列名" #define "requireUnsigned" as bool default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "是否要求类型必须为 Unsigned"
if @domain.sqlType not in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ALTER_COLUMN'] then return true end
if !@domain.auto then return true end
if !@func.string.equalsIgnoreCase(@domain.column, #{columnName}) then return false end
if cast(#{requireUnsigned} as bool) then return @domain.unsigned else return true end
if @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_COLUMN'] then return @domain.defaultValue != null end

#define "allow" as bool default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "是否允许使用外键约束"
if @domain.sqlType in ['CREATE_TABLE_ADD_CONSTRAINT', 'ALTER_TABLE_ADD_CONSTRAINT'] then
if @domain.type == 'ForeignKey' then return cast(#{allow} as bool) else return true end
end

#define "allow" as string default "Select and With Select" enum ["Select", "Select and With Select"] hint "表示允许的查询语句类型"
if @domain.sqlType in ['SELECT', 'WITH_SELECT'] then
if #{allow} == 'Select and With Select' then return true end
if #{allow} == 'Select' and @domain.sqlType == 'SELECT' then return true else return false end end

#define "allow" as string default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "是否允许空的 where 条件"
if @domain.sqlType in ['SELECT'] then
if @func.string.isBlank(@domain.table) and @func.string.equalsAny( @domain.dsType , ['Db2','Db2Fori','SQLServer']) then return true end
if #{allow} == 'true' or @domain.hasWhere then return true end
return false end

#define "allow" as string default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "表示允许的查询语句出现 as 别名关键字"
if @domain.sqlType in ['SELECT'] then
if #{allow} == 'true' or @domain.hasAs == false then return true else return false end
end

#define "allow" as string default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "表示是否允许联表查询"
if @domain.sqlType in ['SELECT'] then if #{allow} == 'true' then return true end
if @func.string.equalsAny( @domain.dsType , ['Db2','Db2Fori','SQLServer']) == false then if @func.array.size(@domain.joinTypes) > 0 then return false else return true end else if @domain.joinType == 'NONE' then return true else return false end end
end

#define "allow" as string default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "是否允许查询中使用内链接或交叉链接"
if @domain.sqlType in ['SELECT'] then
if #{allow} == 'true' then return true end
if @func.string.equalsAny( @domain.dsType , ['Db2','Db2Fori','SQLServer']) == false then if @func.array.containAny(@domain.joinTypes , ['INNER_JOIN','CROSS_JOIN']) then return false end else if @domain.joinType in ['INNER_JOIN', 'CROSS_JOIN'] then return false end end
return true
end

if @domain.sqlType in ['SELECT', 'WITH_SELECT'] then
return !@domain.hasSubQuery
end

#define "allow" as string default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "表示是否允许使用 union 聚合结果"
if @domain.sqlType in ['SELECT', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE', 'INSERT'] then
if #{allow} == 'true' or @domain.hasUnion == false then return true else return false end
end

#define "allow" as string default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "是否允许使用 WITH 字句"
if @domain.sqlType in ['SELECT'] then
if cast(#{allow} as bool) then return true end
return not @domain.hasWith end

#define "allow" as string default "None" enum ["Any", "Select", "From", "Where", "None"] hint "允许子查询出现的位置"
if @domain.sqlType != 'SELECT' or @domain.mode != 'NORMAL' then return true end
if 'Any' in @func.string.split(#{allow}, ',') then return true end
if @domain.selectInSelect and 'Select' not in @func.string.split(#{allow}, ',') then return false end
if @domain.selectInFrom and 'From' not in @func.string.split(#{allow}, ',') then return false end
if @domain.selectInWhere and 'Where' not in @func.string.split(#{allow}, ',') then return false end

#define "columns" as string default "column" hint "输出参数，结果集中缺少的字段"
map = @func.constraint.checkSelectColumn(@domain.primaryUid,@domain.dsId,@domain.selectItems) columns = @func.string.getListElement(map,0)
return @func.string.getListElement(map,1) == 'true'

#define "allow" as string default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "是否允许空的 where 条件"
if @domain.sqlType in ['UPDATE'] then
return #{allow} == 'true' or @domain.hasWhere
end

#define "columns" as string default "" hint "更新必须包含的列，多个用逗号分割"
if @domain.sqlType != 'UPDATE' then return true end
if @func.string.trim(#{columns}) == '' then return true end
return @func.string.split(#{columns}, ',') in @domain.setColumns

#define "allow" as string default "UPDATE" enum ["UPDATE", "UPDATE and UPDATE_SET_SELECT"] hint "表示允许的更新语句类型"
if @domain.sqlType in ['UPDATE', 'UPDATE_SET_SELECT'] then
if #{allow} == 'UPDATE and UPDATE_SET_SELECT' then return true end
if #{allow} == 'UPDATE' and @domain.sqlType == 'UPDATE' then return true else return false end end

#define "allow" as string default "Any" enum ["Any", "Set", "Where", "None"] hint "允许子查询出现的位置"
if @domain.sqlType != 'UPDATE' then return true end
if 'Any' in @func.string.split(#{allow}, ',') then return true end
if @domain.selectInSet and 'Set' not in @func.string.split(#{allow}, ',') then return false end
if @domain.selectInWhere and 'Where' not in @func.string.split(#{allow}, ',') then return false end

#define "allow" as string default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "是否允许同时更新多表"
if @domain.sqlType == 'UPDATE' then return #{allow} == 'true' or @domain.multiUpdate == false end

#define "allow" as string default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "表示是否允许使用ignore"
if @domain.sqlType in ['UPDATE'] then
if #{allow} == 'false' and @domain.hasIgnore == true then return false else return true end
end

#define "require" as string default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "INSERT 语句中是否必须指明列" #define "columns" as string default "id,create_gmt,modify_gmt" hint "INSERT 语句中必须要包含的列，多个列使用逗号区分"
if @domain.sqlType not in ['INSERT'] then return true end
if @domain.onlyValues then return !cast(#{require} as bool) end
return @func.string.split(#{columns}, ',') in @domain.columns

#define "allow" as string default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "表示是否允许使用ignore"
if @domain.sqlType in ['INSERT'] then
if #{allow} == 'false' and @domain.conflict == 'IGNORE' then return false else return true end
end

#define "allow" as string default "true" enum ["true", "false"] hint "表示是否允许使用子查询"
if @domain.sqlType in ['INSERT'] then
if #{allow} == 'true' then return true end
return !(@domain.fromSelect or @domain.hasSubQuery)
end

#define "allow" as string default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "是否允许空的 where 条件"
if @domain.sqlType in ['DELETE'] then
return #{allow} == 'true' or @domain.hasWhere
end

#define "allow" as string default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "表示是否允许同时删除多表数据"
if @domain.sqlType in ['DELETE'] then
if #{allow} == 'true' then return true end
return @domain.multiDelete == false
end

#define "allow" as string default "Any" enum ["Any", "Where", "None"] hint "允许子查询出现的位置"
if @domain.sqlType != 'DELETE' then return true end
if 'Any' in @func.string.split(#{allow}, ',') then return true end
if @domain.selectInWhere and 'Where' not in @func.string.split(#{allow}, ',') then return false end

#define "allow" as string default "false" enum ["true", "false"] hint "表示是否允许使用ignore"
if @domain.sqlType in ['DELETE'] then
if #{allow} == 'false' and @domain.hasIgnore == true then return false else return true end
end

sensitiveRules.ruleDef: if @domain.hasRange then return "algorithm::FULL_MASK" else return "algorithm::ORIGINAL" end

#define "match" as string default "" hint "匹配出现的字符，多个请按逗号分割"
if @func.string.isNotBlank(#{match}) and @func.string.containsIgnoreCaseAny(@domain.value, @func.string.split(#{match}, ',')) then return "algorithm::FULL_MASK" else return "algorithm::ORIGINAL" end

#define "match" as string default "" hint "匹配出现的字符，多个请按逗号分割"
if @func.string.isNotBlank(#{match}) and @func.string.containsIgnoreCaseAny(@domain.column, @func.string.split(#{match}, ',')) then return "algorithm::FULL_MASK" else return "algorithm::ORIGINAL" end

#define "match_col" as string default "" hint "匹配出现的列名" #define "match_data" as string default "" hint "匹配出现的字符，多个请按逗号分割"
if @func.string.isBlank(#{match_data}) or @func.string.isBlank(#{match_col}) then return "algorithm::ORIGINAL" end
if @func.string.containsIgnoreCaseAny(@domain.value, @func.string.split(#{match_data}, ',')) and @domain.column == #{match_col} then return "algorithm::FULL_MASK" else return "algorithm::ORIGINAL" end
